channel.title: Rockin-the-Ipod on smpaget blog
channel.description: Recent content in Rockin-the-Ipod on smpaget blog

item.title: exit -shuffle stage right.... Carberry Finale/celebration weekend
item.description:
the shuffle function on the Ipod may be the subject of rumours and questioning, but sometimes it gets the results so right. we drove away quietly.
as we sat in the car i plugged in my non-generic mp3 player selected music, songs and pressed shuffle.

When I was born,
my daddy said i was broken
the beginning of the end of a life i hadn’t chosen.
he taught me how to give up, taught me how to work the system
but i never had the time.
i never had the luxury.

item.title: New Widgets
item.description: ScottAtSchelp: Recently Listened TracksGet your own widgetView ScottAtSchelp’s profileLoad this chart in a pop up Widgets I love them. on the mac press f12 and your widgets come up. Lovely anyway rockin the Ipode is now updates weekly but the handy widgets provided by Last.fm you can see them on the right of your screen
